# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl gnupg
RUN mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/gpgkey/nodesource-repo.gpg.key | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.gpg
RUN echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.gpg] https://deb.nodesource.com/node_22.x nodistro main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nodesource.list
RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y nodejs
RUN apt-get install -y build-essential python3 make g++
RUN apt-get install -y git openssh-client bash
RUN apt-get install -y vim nano less procps psmisc lsof
RUN apt-get install -y tzdata locales
RUN apt-get install -y net-tools iproute2 iputils-ping dnsutils
RUN apt-get install -y unzip zip tar gzip xz-utils
RUN apt-get install -y pkg-config libc6-dev
RUN apt-get install -y jq
RUN apt-get clean
RUN rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install

COPY . .

EXPOSE 3000

CMD ["npm", "start"]
